name: New York Rye- Florida Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients.
2. Mix until well combined and let rest for about 10 minutes.
3. Start the machine in white bread mode.
4. The dough will rise quickly due to the warm Florida climate.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
6. Let it proof at room temperature for another 1-2 hours until doubled in size.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
